text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Man, I really want to see my little bro!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You really love him lots! I definitely understand
where you're coming from.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The video you showed me of him crawling about
the other day was very cute.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yeah, he's the cutest in the whole universe!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Since moving to the dorms my chances of seeing
him have gone way down, so I can't help but hug
him tight whenever we do meet!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I can see why you'd never want to let go too.
Babies are just so squishy, and it feels nice to just
hold them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You got that right! He's gonna get all bulky when
he gets older, so now's my only chance!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: You're already assuming he's gonna bulk up?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe, well he is Ryan's little brother after all. I can't wait to see what kind of person he becomes.
